data.description: FINITE 14-CITY MANHATTAN TSP. Cities: 0=(33,78), 1=(1,19), 2=(15,73), 3=(9,97), 4=(30,5), 5=(72,51), 6=(33,69), 7=(30,21), 8=(16,63), 9=(90,24), 10=(74,53), 11=(64,28), 12=(96,60), 13=(21,65). Produce a Hamiltonian cycle beginning at city "0"; return to 0 is implicit. Minimise total Manhattan distance. Candidate content MUST be one JSON object exactly in this useful shape: {"tour":["0",...,"13"],"rationale":"short text"}. The tour must contain every city ID exactly once and must not repeat 0 at the end.
